/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/HeartController.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeartController.dir/src/controller/Simulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeartController.dir/src/model/Motor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeartController.dir/src/model/PressureSensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeartController.dir/src/model/StarlingCurve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeartController.dir/src/model/CirculationModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeartController.dir/src/model/Statistics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HeartController.dir/src/view/Terminal.cpp.o -o HeartController  -lpthread
